context: Tests whether the agent creates a modular command structure with each subcommand in its own file, uses a barrel export in commands/index.ts, uses addCommand() in the main program, defines TypeScript interfaces for options, and loads version from package.json.

checklist.name: Separate file per command
checklist.description: Each of the three subcommands (publish, deprecate, info) is defined in its own dedicated file (e.g. commands/publish.ts, commands/deprecate.ts, commands/info.ts)

checklist.name: Barrel export in commands/index.ts
checklist.description: A commands/index.ts barrel file exists that re-exports all three command instances

checklist.name: Commands exported as Command instances
checklist.description: Each command file exports its Command instance as a named export (not inline-defined in the main program)

checklist.name: addCommand() in main program
checklist.description: The main entry point uses .addCommand() to attach each subcommand (not program.command() inline)

checklist.name: TypeScript interfaces defined
checklist.description: At least two of the three subcommands have a dedicated TypeScript interface or type for their options

checklist.name: choices() for format option
checklist.description: The 'info' command's --format option uses .choices() or .addOption(new Option(...).choices([...])) to constrain to 'json' and 'table'

checklist.name: requiredOption for reason
checklist.description: The 'deprecate' command's --reason option is declared with .requiredOption() rather than .option() with manual validation

checklist.name: kebab-case flags
checklist.description: All multi-word option flags use kebab-case (e.g. --dry-run not --dryRun)

checklist.name: parseAsync with await
checklist.description: The main entry point calls await program.parseAsync(process.argv)

checklist.name: Version from package.json
checklist.description: The program version is loaded from package.json (via import or readFileSync) rather than a hardcoded string literal
